# Basic Assignment

Basic assignment operator

```perl
$var = $value;
```

# Expected Compilation Outcomes

## Clean Perl Output

```perl
use v5.36;
$var = $value;
```

## Typed Perl Output

```perl
$var = $value;
```

## Inferred Perl Output

```perl
# Type inference not yet fully implemented
```

# Expected Type Errors

```
(none)
```
